editorial_accuracy.notes: Unchanged. 133 evidence blocks, all sources clean. RSS feed now accurately represents all 31 chapters.

information_design.notes: GSC property verified, sitemap submitted, 7 priority URLs manually indexed. XML/TXT cache headers fixed (1h vs immutable 1y).

code_quality.notes: Cache headers differentiated: immutable 1y for hashed assets, 1h for XML/TXT, no-cache for HTML. Server-side bot detection covers 16 user agents.
